---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or integration
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow or limitation should this improve?

## Proposal

Describe the feature or behavior you would like.

## Scope

Which interface should it affect?

- CLI
- TUI
- API
- Docker
- Python integration
- Documentation

## Privacy And Safety Notes

Does this feature handle documents, credentials, external APIs, or generated artifacts?

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler approaches or workarounds.
